# DJC Marketing — DakJen Creative LLC

DJC Marketing is a lease-up marketing firm specializing in affordable and workforce housing developments. We help properties achieve faster stabilization by driving strong lead volume, supporting applicants through the process, and maintaining clear communication between owners, property managers, and prospective residents.

## What We Do

We run multi-channel lease-up marketing campaigns for affordable and workforce housing developments. Our work spans digital advertising, organic social media, traditional media, grassroots community outreach, model unit staging, and applicant support.

## Who We Serve

Developers, property managers, and investors working on affordable housing, workforce housing, and mixed-income residential developments — particularly those navigating lease-up timelines, investor reporting requirements, and Section 8/HCVP compliance.

## Services

### Tier 1 — Online & Social Campaign
Digital lead generation across paid and organic channels.
- Targeted social media ads on Facebook, Instagram, Google, and LinkedIn
- Organic content creation and scheduling
- Email outreach to community partners and organizations
- Strategic apartment listings and digital placement
- Biweekly performance tracking reports

### Tier 2 — Total Marketing Package (Most Popular)
Everything in Tier 1, plus traditional media and expanded community outreach.
- Billboard and job site banner coordination
- Radio, newspaper, and podcast placements
- Agency, nonprofit, and employer partnership outreach
- Printed flyer and poster distribution in target neighborhoods
- On-site activation and signage coordination
- Ongoing stakeholder communication and reporting

### Tier 3 — Full Boat
All channels plus full community engagement. Our most comprehensive approach.
- Direct grassroots neighborhood engagement and canvassing
- Model unit staging — design, procurement, delivery, and photography
- Optional 50% furniture donation perk through affiliated nonprofit
- Application support: follow-up, re-review, document assistance
- Full applicant pool analysis and pipeline reporting

### Add-On Services
- Application Support: Per-applicant review, follow-up by phone, email, and text. Proven to recover 20%+ of initially rejected applicants.
- Model Unit Staging: Full design, procurement, delivery, and staging of a tour-ready model unit with professional photography.
- Applicant Pool Reporting: Deep-dive analytics, lead pipeline breakdowns, Section 8 tracking, and benchmark comparisons.

## Our Approach

We structure every engagement in two phases:

**Phase 1 — Ramp-Up & Launch (Month 1)**
Establish positioning, create visibility, generate strong lead flow. Includes strategy session, core collateral, photography, launch of paid and organic campaigns, community outreach, flyer distribution, on-site activation, and first biweekly report.

**Phase 2 — Follow-Through & Re-Orientation (Months 2–3)**
Convert leads, re-engage prospects, and refine strategy based on data. Includes prospect follow-up, retargeting, messaging adjustments, re-prioritization of top channels, and final lease-up performance summary.

## Proven Results

**Case Study: 9410 Hough Avenue, Cleveland, OH**
116-unit mixed-income affordable housing development. Full Boat package — 6-month lease-up campaign, application support, and model unit staging.

- 400 inquiries in the first 48 hours
- 150 applications opened in the first 48 hours
- 470+ total applications to date
- 36.2% application success rate (13.7 points above the ~22.5% industry average)
- 18.8% strong candidate rate (vs. 10–12% industry average)
- >20% reapplication rate driven by active applicant follow-up

## What Sets DJC Apart

- Development insider knowledge: We understand how affordable housing deals work, what investors expect, and what property managers need.
- Wide audience reach: High-volume, high-intent lead generation — not noise.
- Transparent, data-rich reporting: Biweekly reports, applicant pool analytics, benchmark comparisons, and pipeline breakdowns.
- Active applicant support: We follow up, re-review flagged applications, and help residents complete the process.
- Multi-channel execution: Digital, traditional, grassroots, employer, and community channels — coordinated by one team.
- Founder-led accountability: Dakotah Jennifer is personally invested in every project.

## The Team

**Dakotah Jennifer** — Founder & Project Lead
Campaign strategy, client relationship management, applicant pool analysis, reporting, and overall project oversight. 5+ years of hands-on experience in the real estate development industry.

**Olivia Blumenshine** — Digital Marketing & Ads Coordinator
Paid digital advertising across Facebook, Instagram, Google, and LinkedIn. Ad strategy, targeting, budget optimization, and campaign performance tracking.

**Jarea Fang** — Marketing Coordinator
Collateral creation, content development, social media management, listing coordination, and community outreach logistics.

**Brittni Hardie** — Communications Manager
Applicant communications, partner outreach, email campaigns, stakeholder updates, and on-the-ground community engagement.
